title: Real-Time Cloud Application Monitoring via Lightweight Invocation Sequence Comparison
data:
Y Fang, Y Zhang, G Lin, Y Gong, Y Huang, L You- 2026 7th International Seminar on, 2026
As power grid systems migrate to cloud computing environments, the need for real-
time application security monitoring becomes critical. However, traditional static 
methods, which rely on offline reverse-analysis and signature matching, are 
inefficient and cannot meet real-time requirements. This paper presents a novel real-
time approach for cloud application security monitoring. It dynamically constructs an
